negative_variants.description: Continuous Laplace Nd Filter: forces the main output to zero, so coarse compilation passes but behavioral stimulus points fail.
Continuous Laplace Nd Filter: preserves the required laplace_nd signature but inverts the filtered output, so compilation passes while the dynamic response is wrong.
Continuous Laplace Nd Filter: mishandles reset or initialization, passing steady-state samples but failing startup or recovery checks.
Continuous Laplace Nd Filter: keeps the main datapath plausible while reporting the wrong metric value.
Continuous Laplace Nd Filter: uses a wrong gain or scale factor, leaving shape plausible while calibrated checks fail.
